channel.title: 2021 on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in 2021 on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-NZeWmOVBmlc/YFi_9zN1PZI/AAAAAAAADzg/j4umwaeY8mcWh704RxJCAgv0HNyLnrHEgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1616429043694931-0.png" alt="How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!" title="How to Monetize Your Facebook Video With Facebook Ad Breaks In 2021!"> Do you own a facebook page? and do you like to monetize it? You can monetize your facebook page but only the videos of them yes, facebook only allows you to monetize the videos that were available on facebook pages with their in-stream ads provided by Facebook creators.
